title: Flaky British Pork Crumble
description: An earthy and flaky meal-prep British dish featuring chili powder, sautéed vegetables, and high-protein-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Pork Crumble Mix
ingredients.amount: 2 cups (mix of oats, breadcrumbs, crushed nuts)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onions and garlic to the skillet; sauté until translucent.
Add diced carrots and potatoes. Cover with a lid and cook for about 10 minutes.
Increase heat to high, add pork cubes, reduce liquid from vegetables, and continue cooking until browned on all sides.
Stir in red pepper flakes to taste.
Transfer cooked pork mixture onto plates.
Layer crumble mix over top of the cooked pork. Cook for an additional 5-10 minutes or until crispy.
Serve hot with mashed potatoes or steamed green vegetables as a side.
